links.context: The new commandment is Christ's (v. 7), that we love as Christ loved ([[JOH.13:34]]; 15:12,
of Christ: love for neighbor ([[JOH.13:34]]). The standard by which we judge is that by which
you, that you also love one another" ([[JOH.13:34]]). Jesus loved mankind more than Himself, and He even died for His enemies ([[ROM.5:6]]-8).
